title: TIM - Process File Indicators With File Hash Type
content:
This playbook processes file indicator by tagging them with the relevant file hash type tag, such as Sha256, Sha1, and Md5.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (TIM_Processing, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.
